name: breaking-news@dscc.org
subject: Comey's out. We need a special prosecutor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Trump just fired FBI Director James Comey -- while Comey was in the middle of investigating the Trump administration.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee555/3656539274/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170509-Breaking_DS-ProsHV")
Team,

Donald Trump just fired FBI Director James Comey -- while Comey was in the middle of leading an FBI investigation into the Trump administration's Russia connections.

With Trump potentially obstructing the FBI's investigation, it's more important than ever that a special prosecutor conduct an investigation that is wholly independent from the White House.

[**Add your name right now to call for a special prosecutor to investigate Russian interference in the 2016 election and the Trump administration's dealings with Russia.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee555/3656539274/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170509-Breaking_DS-ProsHV")

While he was still serving as FBI Director, Comey told Congress that we know the Russian government interfered to sway the outcome of the 2016 election.

What we don't know is the full extent to which Trump and his campaign staff were in contact with Russian officials -- or what they really discussed.

And those are questions the American people deserve answers to.

**We cannot allow Trump to cover up his administration 's contacts with the Russian government by firing the FBI director. Add your name to call for a special prosecutor now:

[http://dscc.org/special-prosecutor](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee555/3656539274/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170509-Breaking_DS-ProsHV")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**A note on your support, friend:**

Senate Democrats are the first line of defense against all of Trump's reckless proposals. We're hard at work readying resources for the fights ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, we mean it when we say we're counting on you.

Please consider making a contribution of any amount today.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170509-Breaking_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee557/3656539274/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee556/3656539274/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e713/2b07114c/52d0ec4e/736ee551/3656539274/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: records@maggiehassan.com
subject: Action needed (healthcare)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2bd/1776750038/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2bd/1776750038/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello --
House Republicans just pushed through a dangerous bill that could drive up costs for anyone with a pre-existing condition.
Under this plan if you're a woman, if you have asthma, if you have cancer, or if you're an older American, you could pay more for your care. Now, it's heading for the Senate.
There's a LOT on the line here, and you're our last line of defense to make sure this devastating plan doesn't become law.**It looks like you haven't added your name to urge Senate Republicans not to pass Trumpcare.[We really need your voice, so please sign now.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2be/1776750038/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170509_healthcare3_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
**EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SIGNED TO PROTECT HEALTHCARE:** **[PENDING](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2be/1776750038/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170509_healthcare3_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
**[RECOMMENDED ACTION: SIGN PETITION](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2be/1776750038/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170509_healthcare3_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
We ALL likely know someone who will be hurt by this plan. This bill could destroy the lives of millions, all so Donald Trump's wealthiest backers and corporate special interests can get a tax break.
It's time to fight back, everyone, and we need you with us more than ever.
[**Add your name to tell Senate Republicans NOT to pass Trumpcare.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd42/2a380d31/15570cf7/fef2be/1776750038/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170504_healthcare-house?source=e20170509_healthcare3_ns&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thanks for taking action,
Team Maggie

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: last night
body:
We need an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor
---
**Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd")**

Friend --

Last night, the President of the United States fired the man responsible for leading an investigation into the President of the United States.

There have been plenty of reasons since January 20th to wake up feeling angry or scared at the latest news from the Trump administration. But what Donald Trump did last night represents a uniquely dangerous threat to American democracy. [**It's up to each and every one of us to hold him accountable.**](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Its+up+to+each+and+every+one+of+us+to+ho&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd")

There's no question about why Trump did it -- this was a transparent attempt to undermine the investigation into the Trump campaign's collusion with Russia to swing the election in Trump's favor. It was done at Trump's personal direction together with an attorney general who has already had to remove himself from anything having to do with the Russia investigation.

This is not the first time Trump has fired a Justice Department official who posed a threat to him. He fired Sally Yates when she refused to enforce a Muslim ban which she knew to be unconstitutional. He fired U.S. Attorney Preet Bharara right after Bharara's office received a request to investigate Trump's conflicts of interest.

The only other President in American history to fire the official investigating him was Richard Nixon. Just like Nixon, Donald Trump must be held responsible.

**Right now, that means there must be an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor. Add your name to join the call for one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfcd/4067b0a/2fbdc1a3b/7e772cab/3483498815/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfcd/4067b0a/2fbdc1a3b/7e772ca8/3483498815/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfcd/4067b0a/2fbdc1a3b/7e772ca9/3483498815/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfcd/4067b0a/2fbdc1a3b/7e772cb6/3483498815/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp_nd&source=em_20170510_tp_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

But what Donald Trump did last night represents a uniquely dangerous threat to American democracy. "" There's no question about why Trump did it -- this was a transparent attempt to undermine the investigation into the Trump campaign's collusion with Russia to swing the election in Trump's favor. It was done at Trump's personal direction together with an attorney general who has already had to remove himself from anything having to do with the Russia investigation. This is not the first time Trump has fired a Justice Department official who posed a threat to him. He fired Sally Yates when she refused to enforce a Muslim ban which she knew to be unconstitutional. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: McConnell refuses independent investigation
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d824/1243791279/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Friends, When I heard the news that Donald Trump fired FBI Director James Comey, I was shocked. As a former member of the House Intelligence Committee, I worked with my colleagues to ensure that partisan politics never clouded our judgment or analysis of the facts. But after Comey's sudden dismissal and the numerous questions around it, what's even more shocking is that too many Republicans in Washington are staying silent and refusing to demand an independent investigation. And now, Mitch McConnell JUST rejected this demand from the American people. This takes partisan politics to a whole new level -- one that we never anticipated. If Republicans are going to continue to put party ahead of people, it's time to vote them out. Please rush in a contribution to help us elect new members of Congress who will take their jobs seriously and support an independent investigation into the Trump/Russia connection. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Rush in $10 now](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d825/1243791279/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10")** **[Rush in $25 now](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d826/1243791279/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25")** **[Rush in $50 now](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d827/1243791279/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50")** **[Rush in $100 now](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d820/1243791279/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100")** **[Or, rush in another amount](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d821/1243791279/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem?refcode=express_lane_other")** Every American deserves real answers to what exactly happened on the Trump campaign. If Mitch McConnell and Paul Ryan aren't going to help us -- let's elect strong leaders who will. Thank you, Patrick Murphy [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d822/1243791279/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/170510pem") |
Paid for by PEM PAC | [http://www.pempac.com](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d823/1243791279/VEsO/ "http://www.pempac.com") | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
[Click here](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2edf/738133e4/2cd95a18/7f85d81c/1243791279/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/subscriptions/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

Contributions or gifts to PEM PAC are not tax deductible.

name: Tom Perez
subject: FBI Director Rudy Giuliani?
body:
We need an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor
---
**Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp2_nd&source=em_20170510_tp2_nd")**

Friend --

Now that Donald Trump has fired James Comey, he gets to appoint the next FBI Director to a 10-year term.

He could pick anyone -- even, for example, a former campaign surrogate like Rudy Giuliani, who spent last night praising Trump's decision from (where else?) the lobby of Trump's new Washington hotel.

And the only check on Donald Trump's appointment would be the Senate GOP -- the same senators who rushed through the confirmations of Jeff Sessions, Betsy DeVos, and Neil Gorsuch.

**[That's why we MUST have an independent investigation into Trump and Russia led by a special prosecutor -- someone whose loyalties will be to the American people, not Donald Trump.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Thats+why+we+MUST+have+an+independent+in&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp2_nd&source=em_20170510_tp2_nd")**

This investigation isn't about politics. It's about our national security, the integrity of our elections, and the future of our democracy. We cannot allow it to be buried by a corrupt administration and complicit Republican leaders in Congress.

**Senator Ron Wyden said it best last night: "in America, the truth always comes out." This independent investigation is how we make that happen. Add your name to demand one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp2_nd&source=em_20170510_tp2_nd")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc9/4067b0a/2fb81603c/7e77104a/3184684913/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp2_nd&source=em_20170510_tp2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc9/4067b0a/2fb81603c/7e77104b/3184684913/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_tp2_nd&source=em_20170510_tp2_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. clean_body: We need an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia. "" Friend -- Now that Donald Trump has fired James Comey, he gets to appoint the next FBI Director to a 10-year term. He could pick anyone -- even, for example, a former campaign surrogate like Rudy Giuliani, who spent last night praising Trump's decision from (where else?) the lobby of Trump's new Washington hotel. And the only check on Donald Trump's appointment would be the Senate GOP -- the same senators who rushed through the confirmations of Jeff Sessions, Betsy DeVos, and Neil Gorsuch. "" This investigation isn't about politics. It's about our national security, the integrity of our elections, and the future of our democracy. We cannot allow it to be buried by a corrupt administration and complicit Republican leaders in Congress. Senator Ron Wyden said it best last night: "in America, the truth always comes out." This independent investigation is how we make that happen. Add your name to demand one today: "" Thanks, Tom Tom Perez Chair Democratic National Committee Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Scott Arceneaux
subject: This is a good sign
body:
#
Team --
The Republican Governor's Association has devoted the majority of their time in the last week to attacking our campaign relentlessly. It's clear that they're terrified of our movement to rebuild Florida, and they're desperate to nip us in the bud.
Why are they so scared this early in the election cycle? Well, let me explain...
Republicans know that their best shot at continuing their winning streak from 2016 is to destroy all hope in the Democratic Party. People who feel hopeless just aren't as likely to turn out to vote, to get involved, or to volunteer on a campaign. **But our campaign is bringing that hope back to Florida Democrats.**
Together, we are building the kind of campaign that the entire state can be proud of, that stands up for every Floridian, that gives opportunity to every family no matter what their background is. And together, with this hope, we're going to win back the Governor's office after more than 20 very long years.
[**Help us keep up this momentum that has the Republicans so petrified of our campaign by chipping in $20.18 or whatever you can afford now >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb334a/9e00690/486eaecd/24034bcf/4238368420/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170510-goodsign-a")
These attacks are a good sign -- it means that they know we have a real shot at victory. Thanks for helping us get here, and for moving forward with us together.
Bring it home,
Scott Arceneaux
Chief Strategist
Andrew Gillum for Governor
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb334a/9e00690/486eaecd/24034bcf/4238368420/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170510-goodsign-a")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb334a/9e00690/486eaecd/24034bce/4238368420/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/ "http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip="). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb334a/9e00690/486eaecd/24034bc1/4238368420/VEsC/ "https://gillum.cp.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/"). [You can support our campaign by making a donation.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb334a/9e00690/486eaecd/24034bc0/4238368420/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-footer")

name: DSCC Rapid Response
subject: POLITICO: McConnell rejects call for special prosecutor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
We wanted you to hear the news -- Mitch McConnell is stonewalling the appointment of a special prosecutor on the Trump administration's Russia ties.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eece9/2692988928/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170510-Rapid-ProsHV")
Team,

With FBI Director James Comey gone, the future of the FBI's investigation into the Trump administration's Russia connections is uncertain.

We already know that the intelligence community believes Russia interfered with our election. We know that there are some incredibly shady connections between Trump's campaign and Russia. And we know that just last week the FBI ramped up its investigation with several new subpoenas regarding Trump's appointee Mike Flynn.

Now that Trump has fired Comey, it's more important than ever that a special prosecutor begin an independent investigation _immediately_.

But just this morning, _Politico_ reported that "Mitch McConnell rejects call for a special prosecutor." It's clear that McConnell has Trump's back -- when what America deserves is answers.

[**We cannot allow McConnell to stonewall a new investigation or help the White House cover up the truth about Russian interference. Add your name to call for a special prosecutor now.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eece9/2692988928/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170510-Rapid-ProsHV")

Uncovering the truth about the Trump administration's Russia ties should be the top priority right now for every possible investigative body.

**It 's unprecedented for a sitting president to fire an FBI director while the FBI is investigating the White House.** It's a major red flag. Despite what McConnell thinks, the only way to assure the American people that the decision to fire Comey wasn't part of a cover up is to immediately appoint a special prosecutor.

**Add your name: demand a special prosecutor to investigate the Trump administration 's Russia ties now:**

[**http://dscc.org/demand-a-prosecutor-now**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eece9/2692988928/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/trump-investigation?source=PT-20170510-Rapid-ProsHV")

Thank you,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eece8/2692988928/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eeceb/2692988928/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e725/2b07114c/532c2391/736eecea/2692988928/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: URGENT ACTION (via FlaDems.com)
subject: Trump's Tuesday night massacre
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Democratic Party
body:
[**ACT NOW: Demand an independent investigation into Donald Trump 's ties to Russia!**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2b5/1a5213b3/7647bc0d/718bb7c7/2002474645/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/independentprosecutor/?code=FLDems&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ftta-russia-fdp%3Frefcode%3Dalsja_russia%26amount%3D25.00%26recurring%3D1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=1+-+ACT+NOW+Demand+an+independent+investigat&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917&refcode=em050917") Listen, Trump's firing of FBI Director James Comey is NOT NORMAL.

It's becoming clearer that this could just be an attempt to thwart the FBI's investigation into potential connections between Trump and Russia.

**We must act.

[Join Florida Democrats and sign our petition demanding an independent special prosecutor to investigate Trump's connections with Russia! >>](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2b5/1a5213b3/7647bc0d/718bb7c6/2002474645/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/independentprosecutor/?code=FLDems&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ftta-russia-fdp%3Frefcode%3Dalsja_russia%26amount%3D25.00%26recurring%3D1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=2+-+Join+Florida+Democrats+and+sign+our+peti&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917&refcode=em050917")**

Trump's firing of Comey - no phone call, no warning - is full on Nixonian.

We can't stand by while Trump appears to tamper with any investigation into him. That's why we need you to stand with us and make your voice heard.

[**Click here to add your name and demand an independent investigation into Trump 's connections to Russia!**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2b5/1a5213b3/7647bc0d/718bb7c1/2002474645/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/independentprosecutor/?code=FLDems&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Ftta-russia-fdp%3Frefcode%3Dalsja_russia%26amount%3D25.00%26recurring%3D1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=3+-+Click+here+to+add+your+name+and+demand+a&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917&refcode=em050917")

Thanks,
Florida Democrats

---

| Paid for by Florida Democratic Party. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
---

We believe that emails are a vital way for the campaign to stay in direct contact with supporters. Click [**here**](http://act.floridadems.org/page/m/77b4b2b5/1a5213b3/7647bc0d/718bb7c0/2002474645/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.floridadems.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=fldems&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em050917&source=em050917&refcode=em050917") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages.

Thanks for your support of Florida Democrats!.

Contributions or gifts to the Florida Democratic Party are not tax deductible.

name: Democrats.org
subject: You haven't signed on yet to demand an independent investigation of Trump and Russia
body:
We need an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor
---
**Add your name: demand an independent investigation into Trump and his connections to Russia.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns")**

We just crossed a huge milestone -- half a million signatures on our petition calling for an independent investigation into Donald Trump's ties to Russia.

We're sending a message to the Trump administration loud and clear: we won't stand for Donald Trump's corruption, and we won't back down until we get the truth.

According to our records for this email address, it doesn't look like we have your signature on file yet. **Make sure Trump and the GOP know you'll hold them accountable. Click below and sign on right now:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns")**
Thanks

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
Sender: Tom Perez
Date: Wed, May 10, 2017
Subject: re: last night

Friend --

Last night, the President of the United States fired the man responsible for leading an investigation into the President of the United States.

There have been plenty of reasons since January 20th to wake up feeling angry or scared at the latest news from the Trump administration. But what Donald Trump did last night represents a uniquely dangerous threat to American democracy. [**It's up to each and every one of us to hold him accountable.**](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+Its+up+to+each+and+every+one+of+us+to+ho&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns")

There's no question about why Trump did it -- this was a transparent attempt to undermine the investigation into the Trump campaign's collusion with Russia to swing the election in Trump's favor. It was done at Trump's personal direction together with an attorney general who has already had to remove himself from anything having to do with the Russia investigation.

This is not the first time Trump has fired a Justice Department official who posed a threat to him. He fired Sally Yates when she refused to enforce a Muslim ban which she knew to be unconstitutional. He fired U.S. Attorney Preet Bharara right after Bharara's office received a request to investigate Trump's conflicts of interest.

The only other President in American history to fire the official investigating him was Richard Nixon. Just like Nixon, Donald Trump must be held responsible.

**Right now, that means there must be an independent investigation led by a special prosecutor. Add your name to join the call for one today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Investigate-Trump-and-Russia1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns")**
Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc7/4067b0a/2fb4102bd/7e77152d/2572591602/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc7/4067b0a/2fb4102bd/7e77152a/2572591602/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc7/4067b0a/2fb4102bd/7e77152b/2572591602/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cfc7/4067b0a/2fb4102bd/7e771528/2572591602/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170510_dnc_ns&source=em_20170510_dnc_ns"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.
